description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Node.js CI Windows Platform that runs on push and pull request events. Use a job matrix to test on multiple Node.js versions (16.x, 18.x, 20.x), architectures (x64, x86), and Windows OS versions (2019, 2022). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Node.js version, verify the installation, install dependencies with npm install, and run npm tests.
